%title Piotr Kozicki
= Piotr Kozicki =
[[https://github.com/ofthegoats|GitHub]];
[[https://orcid.org/0009-0003-5730-6895|ORCID]];
[[https://www.linkedin.com/in/piotrkozicki|LinkedIn]];
[[https://mathstodon.xyz/@ofthegoats|Fediverse]]
----
{{local:./docs/static/images/resize_mugshot.jpeg|mugshot|}}

M.Sc.R. student at the University of Bristol in the
[[https://plrg-bristol.github.io/|Programming Languages Research Group]]
supervised by [[https://seis.bristol.ac.uk/~tz20861/|Dr. Alex Kavvos]].

My research interests are scattered around:
- (modal) logic and semantics
- (homotopy) type theory
- category theory and duality

== Publications ==

- [[https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06533|Relational Dualities and Bisimulation]] -
  Piotr Kozicki and G. A. Kavvos (Accepted at FSCD 2026)

== Talks ==

- Upcoming: Relational Dualities and Bisimulation at Bristol PLRG

== Teaching ==

The primary function of a university is to teach. As a postgraduate research
student, alongside my own studies and research, I have been allowed to take on
some teaching responsibilities.

=== 2025-2026 ===

- [[COMS1XXXX]] - unit lead

== Reading Groups ==

I participate in and run a few reading groups at the university.

- [[HoTT Reading|HoTT]] - Homotopy Type Theory reading group
- [[CSoLL Reading|CSoLL]] - Categorical Semantics of Linear Logic reading group


== Contact ==

Please use my email or message me on Zulip, which I check far more often than
Teams.

`piotr dot kozicki at bristol dot ac dot uk`

81 Woodland Road, Bristol, BS8 1US, United Kingdom
